case_title: GUO XIONG WANG VS. BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
